error_signature: The workflow did not return a response
title: Sub-workflow did not return a response due to race conditions
symptom: The main workflow fails with the error 'The workflow did not return a response' despite the sub-workflow executing successfully.
applies_when: Using a sub-workflow in an AI agent
Multiple parallel workflow streams leading to a single node
not_this_if: Single workflow stream without parallel execution
root_cause: The error occurs due to race conditions when multiple parallel streams are merged into a single Code Node. The JavaScript code using `.all()` does not handle these conditions correctly, leading to the main workflow not receiving a proper response.
fix_steps: Identify the parallel workflow streams in your main workflow
Insert a Merge Node before the Code Node to consolidate results
Test the workflow again to ensure it returns a response
agent_instruction: Add a Merge Node before the Code Node to handle parallel execution results.
